mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM `user` where del = 'N'
AND (user_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{userName}, '%') OR nick_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%'))

SELECT * FROM `user` WHERE del = 'N' AND id IN
#{id}

SELECT id AS user_id, user_name, nick_name, avatar FROM `user` WHERE del = 'N' AND (user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{likeKeyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR nick_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{likeKeyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\') ORDER BY CASE WHEN user_name = #{keyword} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, id DESC LIMIT 20
